ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Increase Of The Bond Or In The Alternative A Waiver Of Bond By Kelly Moore.
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Continued To Nov-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedent'S Estate And Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Kalliope S. Bechler-Lafleche.

The Court found that the decedent is the natural parent of Kelly Moore, that a parent/child relationship existed, that Kelly Moore was deemed the sole heir at law of the decedent's estate, and granted the petition, (subject to review of the order). The Court raised the issue regarding an increase in the bond amount and set the matter for November 10, 2008 for status on the increase in bond or in the alternative a waiver of bond by Kelly Moore.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
